article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.2. Proposed Covenant Discharge 8340 Fraser Reach Court 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Removing Restaurant-Only Restriction at Burnaby Industrial Site
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on removing a legal restriction (called a covenant) that currently requires a 2,217 sq. ft. space at 8340 Fraser Reach Court to be used only as a restaurant. If approved, the space could be converted to light industrial use.
briefs.action_required: If you are interested in leasing this space as a restaurant, contact Oxford Properties before the February 10, 2026 council meeting.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — covenant discharge at 8340 Fraser Reach Court

briefs.industries: Food Service, Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt
